items.title: The Boeing Company (NYSE:BA)’s Defense Workers Strike After Rejecting Contract Offer
items.description: The Boeing Company (NYSE:BA) is among the 11 Best Large Cap Defense Stocks to Buy According to Analysts. The aircraft manufacturer is encountering a major labor strife, as more than 3,000 defense unit workers have gone on strike after turning down a contract offer. Late last month, union members at the company’s St. Louis defense […]
